category_sources: source_facts.description says SDK for building Kubernetes applications; official Operator SDK docs describe building Kubernetes native applications and Operators.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title is "Operator SDK Documentation"; source_facts.name is operator-sdk.
docs_sources: Official Operator SDK documentation is hosted at sdk.operatorframework.io/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/operator-framework/operator-sdk, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify Kubernetes SDK CLI; official docs cover building operators, CLI, testing, and OLM integration.
